description: Former Pakistan all-rounder Azhar Mahmood defended Babar Azam, deeming it unfair to single him out for strike-rate issues in T20 cricket, arguing Pakistan lacks ultra-aggressive batters in the format. Mahmood emphasised that Babar sets the platform for others, and realistic expectations are needed, as the country doesn't possess consistently high-strike-rate players.

description: 'Bhooth Bangla,' featuring Akshay Kumar, has burst onto the cinematic scene, creeping close to Rs 100 crore in worldwide earnings over its opening weekend. This horror-comedy, helmed by Priyadarshan, saw an impressive Rs 58.75 crore net in India by the fourth day. Viewers are embracing the film with enthusiasm, making the weekday box office performance a hot topic of discussion. Read on to know more in detail.

As Amazon, SpaceX clash at FCC, Musk congratulates Bezos on New Glenn rocket launch
description: Blue Origin successfully launched its New Glenn rocket, showcasing reusable booster technology with a vertical landing.  This achievement, acknowledged by Elon Musk, comes amidst ongoing regulatory disputes between Amazon and SpaceX concerning satellite proposals.  Both companies are vying for FCC approval for large satellite constellations, highlighting a competitive landscape in space infrastructure.

title: Yann LeCun says Anthropic CEO 'knows absolutely nothing' about AI effects on jobs
description: AI expert Yann LeCun disagrees with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei's forecast of AI eliminating many entry-level jobs. LeCun suggests economists are better equipped to analyze technological impacts on employment. Amodei previously warned AI could replace a significant portion of white-collar roles within five years, calling AI a general labor substitute.

title: Brazilian triathlete Mara Araujo’s final post resurfaces after tragedy
description: Brazilian triathlete Mara Flavia Araujo died during the swimming leg of the Ironman Texas triathlon on April 19, 2026. Her last Instagram post, shared hours earlier, has gone viral after her death. Reports from Chosun.com and Yahoo confirm she went missing during the swim. A close friend revealed she was unwell before the race but still chose to compete.

title: 'Everyone can have a penthouse if they want': Elon Musk on AI-driven future
description: Elon Musk reignited debate on universal basic income, proposing it as a solution to AI-driven job losses. He envisions a future of extreme abundance where AI and robotics will generate vast goods and services, making even luxuries like penthouses widely accessible without inflation. Musk previously predicted no poverty, only universal high income.

title: Lauren Kyle celebrates milestone as McDavid eyes Stanley Cup glory
description: Connor McDavid capped the regular season with four assists, clinching his sixth Art Ross Trophy as the Oilers secured home-ice advantage. His growing chemistry with linemates and a strong team performance signal readiness for the playoffs. Off the ice, Lauren Kyle’s proud reaction added a personal layer. With momentum and structure in place, Edmonton enters its first-round series against Anaheim with real expectations.
